mapper.select: SELECT account_id FROM account_groups WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT group_id FROM account_groups WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_groups (account_id, group_id, priority, created_at) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{groupId}, #{priority}, NOW())
INSERT INTO account_groups (account_id, group_id, priority, created_at) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{groupId}, 0, NOW())
